zh.lifeSummary: 當William Kyngdon於1420年出生在英國英格蘭可瓦爾奎瑟頓可時，他的父親Roger Kyngdon27歲，母親Johanna25歲。他至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1460年在英國英格蘭可瓦爾勞傑爾斯享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Kyngdon于1420年出生在英国英格兰可瓦爾奎瑟頓可时，他的父亲Roger Kyngdon27岁，母亲Johanna25岁。他至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1460年在英国英格兰可瓦爾勞傑爾斯享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: Kyngdon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southwestern, especially Devon): habitational name from Higher Kingdon in Alverdiscott, or from Kendon in North Bovey, both in Devon. Both are named in Old English from cyning ‘king’ (see King ) or cyne- ‘royal’ + dūn ‘hill’.

variants.name: King
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English king ‘king’ (Old English cyning, cyng), perhaps acquired by someone with kingly qualities or as a pageant name by someone who had acted the part of a king or had been chosen as the master of ceremonies or ‘king’ of an event such as a tournament, festival or folk ritual. In North America, the surname King has absorbed several European cognates and equivalents with the same meaning, for example German König (see Koenig ) and Küng, French Roy , Slovenian, Croatian, or Serbian Kralj , Polish Krol . It is also very common among African Americans. It is also found as an artificial Jewish surname.
English: occasionally from the Middle English personal name King, originally an Old English nickname from the vocabulary word cyning, cyng ‘king’.
Irish: adopted for a variety of names containing the syllable rí (which means ‘king’ in Irish).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Kyngdon was born in 1420, in Quethiock, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, his father, Roger Kyngdon, was 27 and his mother, Johanna, was 25. He had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1460, in Launcells, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Kyngdon est né en 1420, à Quethiock, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger Kyngdon, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Johanna, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1460, à Launcells, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Kyngdon 1420 in Quethiock, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Kyngdon 27 und seine Mutter Johanna 25. Er hatte mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1460 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Launcells, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Kyngdon è nato il nel 1420 nel Quethiock, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Roger Kyngdon, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Johanna, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1460, nel Launcells, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Kyngdonが1420年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルクエスイオックで生まれた時，父Roger Kyngdonは27歳，母Johannaは25歳であった。彼は少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1460年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルラウンセルズで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Kyngdon(이)가 1420년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 크스이오c크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Kyngdon(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Johanna(은)는 25세였다. 그는 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1460년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 로셀스에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Kyngdon nasceu em 1420, em Quethiock, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Roger Kyngdon, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Johanna, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1460, em Launcells, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Kyngdon родился в 1420 г. в местности куетиокк, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Roger Kyngdon было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna, 25. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1460 г. в местности лаунселлс, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Kyngdon nació en 1420, en Quethiock, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Roger Kyngdon, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Johanna, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1460, en Launcells, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 40 años.
